titles.title: Living Where the Healing Waters Flow

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Living on the shore, I'm living on the shore, I'm living where the healing waters flow; Living on the shore, I'm living on the shore, I'm living where the healing waters flow.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: With Israel's trusting children I'm rejoicing on my way, I'm living where the healing waters flow; The cloudy, fiery pillar is my guiding light today. I'm living where the healing waters flow.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My hung'ring soul is satisfied with manna from above, I'm living where the healing waters flow, No more I thirst, the rock I've found, that fount of endless love; I'm living where the healing waters flow.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'm singing "Hallelujah," safely anchored in my soul, I'm living where the healing waters flow, I'm resting on his promises; the blood has made me whole. I'm living where the healing waters flow.
